description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a landscaped yard with a mix of coniferous and deciduous trees. The structure features a low-pitched gable roof, a prominent front porch, and large windows that allow ample natural light. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored siding with darker roofing material, and the property includes paved walkways and a driveway leading to the entrance. The landscaping integrates natural rock formations and shrubbery, creating a harmonious blend with the environment. The overall design is compact and functional, with a clear separation between the living space and the surrounding garden.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, and large windows, set within a landscaped yard with trees and rock formations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, and a clear view of the landscaped yard with trees behind the bungalow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side yard, and the transition from paved surfaces to natural landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, extensive rock formations, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view emphasizing the roof structure, porch, and the arrangement of trees and pathways around the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
